name: com.zoom/zoom-mcp
title: Zoom
description: Schedule meetings, list recordings, manage chat, and read your calendar - Zoom's official hosted MCP.

byoClient.guide:
Zoom requires every OAuth integration to be registered as a Zoom App in their Marketplace.

**1.** Open **marketplace.zoom.us/develop/create** and sign in. Click **Build App** → choose **OAuth** (or **User-managed OAuth App** if prompted).

**2.** Pick **User-managed app** (so each Wayland user authorizes their own account). Click **Create**.

**3.** On the **App credentials** tab:
  - Add the URL Wayland shows below to **Redirect URL for OAuth** AND to **OAuth allow list**.
  - Copy **Client ID** and **Client Secret**.

**4.** On the **Scopes** tab, click **Add Scopes** and add: `meeting:read`, `meeting:write`, `recording:read`, `chat_message:write`.

**5.** Paste the Client ID and Secret below. The app does not need to be published to the marketplace - local testing is enough.
